query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS menu_views_hourly (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  establishmentId INT NOT NULL,
  dayOfWeek INT NOT NULL,
  hour INT NOT NULL,
  viewCount INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_establishment_day_hour (establishmentId, dayOfWeek, hour)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS menu_views_hourly (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  establishmentId INT NOT NULL,
  dayOfWeek INT NOT NULL,
  hour INT NOT NULL,
  viewCount INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_establishment_day_hour (establishmentId, dayOfWeek, hour)
);
